maragoli: Mukali weve yalangwa Sabeti.
english: His wife's name was Elizabeth.

maragoli: Yaali mulala ku avakaana vi kisukururwi chu Musaalisi Haruni.
english: She also belonged to a priestly family.

maragoli: Vosi vaali avalungi imbiri wa Nyasaye.
english: They both lived good lives in God's sight.

maragoli: Vatia ligali nokolonda malago na makuva gu Mwami vugira imbara.
english: They obeyed fully all the Lord's laws and commands.

maragoli: Navuzwa sivali numwana mba.
english: They had no children.

maragoli: Sabeti yaali umugumba.
english: Elizabeth could not have any (she was barren).

maragoli: Vosi vaali vahindira ligali.
english: They were both very old.

maragoli: Lidiku lilala Zakaria yaali naakoraa miyinzi ju vusaalisi imbiri wa Nyasaye.
english: One day Zechariah was doing his work as a priest in the Temple.

maragoli: Mu Litembeli kuli lilohiza lia vuli lidiku lialange.
english: Taking his turn in the daily service.

maragoli: Yatovolwa nikura kuli mwima gwu vusaalisi.
english: He was chosen by lot to burn incense.

maragoli: Kwingira mu Litembeli liu Mwami.
english: So he went into the Temple of the Lord.

maragoli: Asambe kimuli ku vwali.
english: To burn incense on the altar.

maragoli: Kiduma kenene chavandu vaali ni vasaala ichova ing'inga yukusaamba kimuli.
english: The crowd of people outside prayed during the hour when the incense was burned.

maragoli: Engelosi wu Mwami yaloleka kuye.
english: An angel of the Lord appeared to him.

maragoli: Nasingiyi ku mukono mulungi gwu vwali.
english: Standing at the right side of the altar.

maragoli: Olovega lwi kimuli chasambirwa.
english: Where the incense was burned.

maragoli: Lwa Zakaria yamulola, yahenda mwoyo kandi naatia ligali.
english: When Zechariah saw him, he was alarmed and felt afraid.

maragoli: Engelosi yamuvolera, Utatia mba, Zakaria.
english: But the angel said to him, Don't be afraid, Zechariah!

maragoli: Kigira Nyasaye ahuliyi lisaala liilio.
english: God has heard your prayer.

maragoli: Mukali woovo Sabeti alakwivulira mwana muyaayi.
english: Your wife Elizabeth will bear you a son.

maragoli: Ulamugulika Yohana.
english: You are to name him John.

maragoli: Ulakave nuvusangali kandi nuvuyanzi.
english: How glad and happy you will be.

maragoli: Avandu vanyingi valakasangala ku liivulwa lilie.
english: How happy many others will be when he is born!

maragoli: Alakave munene imbiri wu Mwami.
english: John will be great in the Lord's sight.

maragoli: Si alinwa iwaini anoho amalwa mba.
english: He must not drink any wine or strong drink.

maragoli: Aliizula Roho Mutakatifu kutura munda mwa mama weve.
english: From his very birth he will be filled with the Holy Spirit.

maragoli: Aliranyia avanyingi ku avandu va Isiraeli ku Mwami Nyasaye wavo.
english: He will bring back many of the people of Israel to the Lord their God.

maragoli: Alimiira imbiri wu Mwami weve nu mwoyo kandi ni zinguru.
english: He will go ahead of the Lord, strong and mighty.

maragoli: Alakahambanyie avababa na avana vaavo kandi.
english: He will bring fathers and children together again.

maragoli: Alalomba avibaali na avatatiizaa Nyasaye vaganagane.
english: He will turn disobedient people back to the way of thinking of the righteous.

maragoli: Alaketegekiziri Mwami avandu veve.
english: He will get the Lord's people ready for him.

maragoli: Zakaria yateeva Engelosi, Inzi ndamanya ndi amakuva yaga?
english: Zechariah said to the angel, How shall I know if this is so?

maragoli: Inzi mbeeye musakulu na mukali wange yakeera.
english: I am an old man, and my wife is old also.

maragoli: Inzi mbeeye Gabirieli usingiraa imbiri wa Nyasaye.
english: I am Gabriel, I stand in the presence of God.

maragoli: Ndumiywi komoloma na ivi.
english: I was sent to speak to you.

maragoli: Ngoletere makuva malahi yaga.
english: I bring you this good news.

maragoli: Hulira, ulava idimbidi.
english: Behold, you will be silent (mute).

maragoli: Siulamoloma mba, kuduuka lwayaga galakekoleke.
english: You will be unable to speak until the day these things happen.

maragoli: Kigira siwasuuvira makuva gange.
english: Because you have not believed my message.

maragoli: Avandu valindilira Zakaria.
english: In the meantime the people were waiting for Zechariah.

maragoli: Vagenya ku lilindagilira lilie mu Litembeli.
english: They wondered why he was spending such a long time in the Temple.

maragoli: Lwa yatura ichova, siyaali anyala komoloma navo mba.
english: When he came out, he could not speak to them.

maragoli: Vamanya ndi aloli malola mu Litembeli.
english: They knew that he had seen a vision in the Temple.

maragoli: Yagelagela vuzwa makono ma namenya naveeye idimbidi.
english: Unable to say a word, he made signs to them with his hands.

maragoli: Lwa yamala madiku geege guvutumiki mu Litembeli yirana yengo weve.
english: When his period of service in the Temple was over, he went back home.

maragoli: Inyima wa madiku yago, mukali weve, Sabeti yavereka.
english: Some time later his wife Elizabeth became pregnant.

maragoli: Yivisa munyumba ku mieli jitano.
english: She did not leave the house for five months.

maragoli: Kalunu Mwami amali kumanyia zimbavasi zizie ku inzi.
english: Now at last the Lord has helped me (shown mercy).

maragoli: Anduliziyi zisoni ziambezaa nazio imbiri wa vandu.
english: He has taken away my public disgrace!

maragoli: Mu mweli gwa sita Sabeti naveeye ninda.
english: In the sixth month Elizabeth was pregnant.

maragoli: Engelosi Gabirieli yatumwa na Nyasaye kuzia Nazareti.
english: God sent the angel Gabriel to Nazareth.

maragoli: Lidaala lia Galilaya.
english: A town in Galilee.

maragoli: Yaali na makuva ku mukaana mugima, uwalangwa Maria.
english: To a young woman (virgin) named Mary.

maragoli: Uwaali niyateevwa koleetwa nu mundu mulala uwalangwa Josefu.
english: Who was promised in marriage to a man named Joseph.

maragoli: Wi kisukululwi cha Daudi.
english: A descendant of King David.

maragoli: Engelosi yazia kuye namuvolera, Mirembe Maria!
english: The angel came to her and said, Peace be with you (Greetings Mary)!

maragoli: Ivi ugasiziywi ni zimbavasi zinyingi!
english: The Lord is with you and has greatly blessed you!

maragoli: Mwami aveeye harara na ivi.
english: The Lord is with you.

maragoli: Lwa Maria yahulira amakuva yaga, yaahenda mwoyo ligali.
english: Mary was deeply troubled by the angel's message.

maragoli: Yaganagana mumwoyo ichi licheliza yili livoora!
english: She wondered what his words meant!

maragoli: Engelosi yamuvolera, Utatia mba, Maria.
english: The angel said to her, Don't be afraid, Mary.

maragoli: Kigira Nyasaye akovereye zimbavasi.
english: God has been gracious to you.

maragoli: Henza! Ivi ulavereka na ulivuula mwana muyaayi.
english: Behold! You will become pregnant and give birth to a son.

maragoli: Ulamugulika, Yeso.
english: You will name him Jesus.

maragoli: Alakave Munene kandi alakalangwe.
english: He will be great and will be called the Son.

maragoli: Muyaayi wa Nyasaye Oveeye igulu Ligali.
english: The Son of the Most High God.

maragoli: Mwami Nyasaye alakamukole alave Mwami kuli guuga weve Daudi.
english: The Lord God will make him a king, as his ancestor David was.

maragoli: Alakamiihi ku avandu va Isiraeli mihiga ni mihiga.
english: He will be the king of the descendants of Jacob forever.

maragoli: Uvwami vwivwe sivulakave nekeheri mba.
english: His kingdom will never end!

maragoli: Maria yateeva engelosi, Yaga galanyalika ndi?
english: Mary said to the angel, How can this be?

maragoli: Kigira inzi mbeeye mugima?
english: Since I am a virgin?

maragoli: Roho Mutakatifu alaza ku ivi.
english: The Holy Spirit will come on you.

maragoli: Zinguru zia Nyasaye oveeye igulu Ligali zilakukinga kuli kiriri.
english: The power of the Most High God will rest upon you.

maragoli: Mwana wa ulivuula alakalangwe Mutakatifu, Mwana wa Nyasaye.
english: The holy child will be called the Son of God.

maragoli: Umanye kali Sabeti mwiko woovo, umali kovereka mwana muyaayi.
english: Remember your relative Elizabeth, she is also pregnant with a son.

maragoli: Yigu nu mweli gwigwe gwa sita.
english: This is her sixth month.

maragoli: Wa vandu valanga mugumba.
english: Though she was called barren.

maragoli: Kigira ku Nyasaye, si keveeye ho kindu ikitanyalikaa mba.
english: For there is nothing that God cannot do.

maragoli: Henza inzi mbeeye mutumikiri wu Mwami.
english: I am the Lord's servant.

maragoli: Gave ku inzi kuli aga ovooye.
english: May it happen to me as you have said.

maragoli: Maria yetegeka, nalomba logendo kuzia vwangu.
english: Mary got ready and hurried off.

maragoli: Lidaala lilala liveeye muvigulu vie Vuyuda.
english: To a town in the hill country of Judea.

maragoli: Yingira munyumba ya Zakaria, nacheliza Sabeti.
english: She went into Zechariah's house and greeted Elizabeth.

maragoli: Lwa Sabeti yahulira licheliza lia Maria, mwana yakina nuvuyanzi munda mwimwe.
english: When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, the baby moved within her.

maragoli: Sabeti yizula Roho Mutakatifu.
english: Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit.

maragoli: Yahanzuka numwoyo munene.
english: She cried out with a loud voice.

maragoli: Ivi ugasiziywi ligali hagati ha vakali vosi.
english: You are the most blessed of all women.

maragoli: Agasizwi umwana wa ivi ulivuula!
english: Blessed is the child you will bear!

maragoli: Inzi nivwaha kali mama wu Mwami wange yaaze ku inzi?
english: Why should the mother of my Lord come to visit me?

maragoli: Lwa mbuliyi mwoyo gwi licheliza liilio, mwana akini munda mwange nuvuyanzi.
english: As soon as I heard your greeting, the baby jumped with gladness.

maragoli: Oveeye nuvugasu ivi uwa suuvira ndi.
english: How happy you are to believe the Lord.

maragoli: Mwoyo gwange gwizominyaa Mwami.
english: My heart praises the Lord.

maragoli: Mwoyo gwange gusangali kigira nu Nyasaye, Muhonyi wange.
english: My soul is glad because of God my Savior.

maragoli: Kigira wizulizi Iiiva liu vwegehizi vwange.
english: For he has remembered me, his lowly servant!

maragoli: Mukaana Mutumikiri weve!
english: I am his servant girl!

maragoli: Kigira kutura kalunu amakura ga avandu vosi galananga, vuyanzi.
english: From now on all generations will call me blessed (happy).

maragoli: Kigira Nyasaye Wizingulu angoleeye vindu vinene.
english: For the Mighty God has done great things for me.

maragoli: Lieta lilie liveeye litakatifu.
english: His name is holy.

maragoli: Zimbavasi zizie ziveeye ku makura namakura.
english: His mercy is from generation to generation.

maragoli: Ku avandu vahaana luyali kuye.
english: To those who honor (fear) him.

maragoli: Akoli vindu vie zinguru nu mukono gwigwe.
english: He has performed mighty deeds with his arm.

maragoli: Usalanyi avigingiri mu zing'anagani zie mioyo jaavo.
english: He has scattered the proud in their own plans.

maragoli: Waguluyi avami vizingulu kutura ku zindeve ziavo ziu vwami.
english: He has brought down mighty kings from their thrones.

maragoli: Navuzwa onenehizi avakeekeke.
english: But he has lifted up the lowly.

english: His name is John.

english: What then will this child be?

english: Zechariah, the father, was filled with the Holy Spirit and prophesied.

maragoli: Agasizwi Mwami Nyasaye wa Isiraeli.
english: Praise the Lord, the God of Israel.

maragoli: Umali kogeniha kandi ohonyi avandu veve.
english: He has come to the help of his people and set them free.

maragoli: Okoheeye muhonyi wi zinguru kutura mukisukululwi cha Daudi.
english: He has provided a mighty Savior from the house of David.

maragoli: Alakohonyia kutura ku avasigu viitu.
english: He will save us from our enemies.

maragoli: Alaveera avaguuga viitu zimbavasi.
english: He shows mercy to our ancestors.

maragoli: Liesuuha lia yisuhira Aburahamu guuga wiitu.
english: The oath which he swore to our ancestor Abraham.

maragoli: Alakuha kuduuki kohonywa.
english: To grant us rescue from our enemies.

maragoli: Kokosola kutura ku avasigu viitu.
english: To deliver us from the hands of our enemies.

maragoli: Kuduuki kumutumikira vugira vuti.
english: To serve him without fear.

maragoli: Kuva avatakatifu kandi avalungi imbiri weve.
english: To be holy and righteous in his sight.

maragoli: Ulalangwa muporofeti wa Nyasaye Oveeye igulu Ligali.
english: You, my child, will be called a prophet of the Most High.

maragoli: Ulazia imbiri wu Mwami kumulombera zinzira zizie.
english: You will go before the Lord to prepare his way.

maragoli: Valahonywa kandi valasamifwa vwoni vwavo.
english: His people will know they are saved by the forgiveness of sins.

maragoli: Nyasaye wiitu aveeye wi zimbavasi kandi umulahi.
english: Our God is merciful and tender.

maragoli: Alalomba vulavu vwovohonyi vwake ku kunyi kutura mwigulu.

maragoli: Kwimilira virenge vietu munzira yi mirembe.
english: To guide our steps into the path of peace.

maragoli: Mwana yaviruka, nanyoora zinguru mu Roho.
english: The child grew and became strong in spirit.
